headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on DTE Energy, Lowers Price Target to $148
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $157 to $148.
